judgment.summary: High-growth, high-valuation company with strong revenue expansion but negative profit margins and significant analyst target dispersion.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 1.6%; next earnings date is 2026-06-03.
positives: Revenue growth 23.3% YoY indicates strong market adoption.
Gross margin 74.8% is robust, suggesting pricing power.
Free cash flow $1.60B TTM shows operational cash generation.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with 51 analysts covering the stock.
negatives: Profit margin -3.4% and negative ROE/ROA indicate unprofitability.
Forward P/E of 105.57x and PEG of 5.09x suggest a very high valuation.
Analyst mean target of $527.63 is below the current spot price.

news.paragraph: CrowdStrike's recent headlines are sparse, offering little immediate directional insight for traders. The next earnings date is set for June 3rd, which may serve as a catalyst. Until then, price action will likely be driven by broader market sentiment and ongoing analyst coverage.

examples.body: $CRWD Sentinel One (S) has the best AI security technology; is a leading and award-winning AI security partner of the US government, Google, AWS, Anthropic and…
$CRWD rode this from 105 to 650 and selling most of my shares here. Godspeed bulls
$CRWD as a cybersecurity stock this is the biggest bubble out there and sooner or later will pop. The multiple is simply unsustainable.
